title: PhD Position Available (Fire and Invasive Plant Interactions)
snippet: A new PhD position looking into managing interactions between fire regimes and invasive plants is now open to receive applications.

title: Graduate Research Scholarships
snippet: # Graduate Research Scholarships. The Melbourne Research Scholarship and Research Training Program (RTP) Scholarship are offered to high-achieving international and domestic students who are enrolling in a graduate research degree at the University of Melbourne. *   Full fee offs

title: Graduate Research Scholarships | University of Melbourne
snippet: The University of Melbourne offers generous and comprehensive scholarship opportunities to recognise talent and support graduate researchers.

title: Graduate research scholarships | Macquarie University
snippet: Take advantage of one or more of our scholarships when you undertake a graduate research degree at Macquarie University. Learn about the application
